profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Falmaco Nonwoven Industri Tbk engages in the manufacture and sale of tissue products and nonwoven fabrics in Indonesia. The company provides baby wet wipes, antiseptic wet wipes, flushable wet wipes, and refreshing wet towel under the Wetkins brand; and glove, sterile gauze, alcohol swabs, hand sanitizer, alcohol wipes, bed sheet, bedliner, earloop face mask, surgical gown, and contamination prevention suit, as well as sanitizer wipes, surface sanitizing wipes, fogging liquid, protective coverall seal and non-seal, surgical mask, and disposable apron under the Falmed+ brand. It offers feminine hygiene, baby underpad, hand and mouth wet wipes, and facial cotton under the Valore brand; and light duty, medium duty, heavy duty, and rayon multipurpose wipes under the Polymorph brand. PT Falmaco Nonwoven Industri Tbk was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Cimahi, Indonesia.
